rulings.Case Title: GELAREH RAHBAR DDS VS. JENNIFER BATOON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, July 12, 2011, line 3. DEFENDANT JENNIFER BATOON'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES. Defendant's motion for fees and amended judgment is granted. The court awards attorneys fees in the amount of $25,893.46. Breakdown is as follows: April 14, 2011 award $12,852.34 (prevailing on SLAPP); April 14, 2011- July 12, 2011 interest $298.67; $12,742.45 for work on responding to motion to reconsider enforcement of judgment and costs. Request for deposition is denied. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, July 12, 2011, line 4. PLAINTIFFS WILLIAM OWEN, BRIAN OSTRUM'S Motion For Order Permitting Claims Of Plaintiff To Be Continued By Decedent's Successor In Interest. Granted, no opposition filed. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: TOMOMI SHIGETA, BY AND THROUGH HER GUARDIAN AD LIT et al VS. WASHINGTON SHOE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Compel Production Of Pltfs Psychological Records From Kaiser;
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, July 12, 2011, line 3. DEFENDANT WASHINGTON SHOE COMPANY'S Motion To Compel Production Of Plaintiffs Psychological Records From Kaiser is denied. Plaintiff is only claiming emotional damages a reasonable person would suffer watching their child suffering injury, not extraordinary emotional injury. Defendants to pay plaintiff $2,000 in sanctions. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Leave For A Hearing On A Special Mtn To Strike The Petition To Vacate Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award Beyond The 60-Day Deadline
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, July 12, 2011, line 9. CROSS COMPLAINANT KAZMER UJVAROSY'S Special Motion To Strike The Petition To Vacate Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award Beyond The 60-Day Deadline.
